description: Creates a 3D line through a point in the direction of a vector.
utility: Create a 3D line from a point and direction vector

alternates.description: Line through point P in direction of vector V

examples.scenario: Line through a point along a direction vector
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
P = point3d(G, 1, 2, 3)
V = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 2, 1, -1)
L = pointvectorline3d(G, P, V)

examples.scenario: Line through origin along x-axis with color
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
P = point3d(G, 0, 0, 0)
V = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0)
L = pointvectorline3d(G, P, V, c(blue))
